name: jellyfin-popfeed-scrobbler
overview: Sync watch history with Popfeed and post to Bluesky
description: Sync your Jellyfin watch history with Popfeed and optionally post to Bluesky when you finish watching.

versions.releaseNotes:
"## 🐛 Bug Fixes

- fix(ci): use commit SHA for jellyfin-plugin-repository-manager (@lguerard)
- fix(ci): commit version update before building (@lguerard)

## 📝 Other Changes

- chore: update version to (@lguerard)
- chore: update manifest and build for v1.0.2 (@lguerard)
- ci(build): update version and build in same job (@lguerard)
- Merge branch 'dev' (@lguerard)
- chore: update manifest and build for v1.0.3 (@lguerard)
- Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/main' (@lguerard)


## 📦 Installation

1. Download the zip
2. Extract to your Jellyfin plugins folder
3. Restart Jellyfin
"

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

- fix(ci): add targetAbi to manifest update (@lguerard)
- fix(ci): use commit SHA for jellyfin-plugin-repository-manager (@lguerard)

## 📝 Other Changes

- chore: update manifest and build for v1.0.1 (@lguerard)
- ci(build): only run on tags, not on push to main (@lguerard)


## 📦 Installation

1. Download the zip
2. Extract to your Jellyfin plugins folder
3. Restart Jellyfin

## ✨ New Features

- feat(manifest): add release notes to version (@lguerard)
- feat(manifest): track all versions, prepend new releases (@lguerard)

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

- fix: use tag version and clean up for fresh start (@lguerard)

## 📝 Other Changes

- chore: update manifest and build for v1.0.0 (@lguerard)
- ci(build): include release notes in manifest update (@lguerard)
- ci(build): add prepare job to update version automatically (@lguerard)
- chore: update version to (@lguerard)
- chore: update manifest and build for v1.0.1 (@lguerard)
- ci(build): download artifact in release job (@lguerard)

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the zip
2. Extract to your Jellyfin plugins folder
3. Restart Jellyfin
